prompt.content:
In the DCF model, please make the following changes for S&P Global:

•	Update the risk-free rate for S&P Global to be the 10 year treasury rate on Jan 2, 2026.
•	Update the long-term growth rate by calculating the month-over-month growth rate using CPI values from August 1, 2025 and September 1, 2025, then annualizing it by multiplying by 12.

Provide the updated Equity value per share for S&P Global under both the Perpetuity and EBITDA method, rounded to two decimals.

rubrics.name: Equity Value per Share under the Perpetuity Growth Method is $428.84... (ver_69f7f14256414a17bb5e6f8abc0450a3)

messages.content: Equity Value per Share under the Perpetuity Growth Method is $428.84 (acceptable range $424.55 to $433.13).

rubrics.name: Equity Value per Share under the EBITDA Multiple Method is $400.17 (acceptable... (ver_18ef714e74c84fe5bde008ea5e5eabe0)

messages.content: Equity Value per Share under the EBITDA Multiple Method is $400.17 (acceptable range $396.17 to $404.17).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Equity Value per Share
•	Perpetuity Growth Method: $428.84
•	EBITDA Multiple Method: $400.17
